title: National Horse of Canada Act
description: National Horse of Canada Act (National Horse of Canada Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Horse of Canada Act .

provisions.title: National horse
provisions.content: 2 The horse known as the Canadian horse is hereby recognized and declared to be the national horse of Canada.
